data.title: Beazer Homes Surpasses $10 Million Raised for Fisher House Foundation
data.description: Beazer Homes, the leading energy-efficient homebuilder in the country, recently shared news of a philanthropic initiative led by employees and partners. This effort has successfully provided one million nights of complimentary housing to veterans and service members. The accomplishment was made possible through the Beazer Charity Foundation. This significant milestone showcases the company's dedication to giving back to those who have served their country.

data.title: In HelloNation, Commercial Roofing Expert Hayden Humphrey Details TPO Roofing Durability
data.description: A recent publication discusses the impact of installation, maintenance, and environmental conditions on the durability of roofs in CHEYENNE, Wyoming. The article, dated March 25, 2026, explores the longevity of TPO roofing systems in the state's challenging weather. HelloNation reveals insights on the expected lifespan of TPO roofs in Wyoming, shedding light on crucial factors that influence their performance.

data.title: Texas Instruments to webcast its 2026 annual meeting of stockholders
data.description: On April 16, 2026, Texas Instruments Incorporated (TI) will host its annual stockholders meeting at 8:30 a.m. Central time in Dallas. The meeting will be broadcasted live via audio webcast.

data.title: In HelloNation, Residential Roofing Expert Tyler Humphrey Outlines Roof Replacement Pricing Factors
data.description: In Cheyenne, Wyoming, a recent article discusses the various factors impacting the expenses of roof replacement for homeowners. It highlights how material types, roof size, and weather conditions play a crucial role in determining the overall costs. For residents in Cheyenne, the article reveals valuable insights on the expected expenses associated with replacing a roof. This information has been shared by HelloNation, shedding light on the approximate costs homeowners can anticipate when undertaking a roof replacement project in the area.

data.title: Westinghouse Suppliers Present Benefits of Building U.S. AP1000® Fleet to Congress
data.description: In Washington, over 40 supply chain partners of Westinghouse Electric Company convened to discuss the advantages of constructing a U.S. fleet of AP1000® plants, the sole advanced, large-scale reactor currently on the market. During the event, they engaged in over 100 meetings with U.S. Congress members to highlight the economic benefits and job opportunities generated in their respective states through the construction of these plants. This effort aimed to emphasize the significance of investing in this technology for local economies.

data.title: Infosys to Acquire Leading Healthcare Digital Transformation Company, Optimum Healthcare IT
data.description: BENGALURU, India and JACKSONVILLE BEACH, Fla - On March 25, 2026, Infosys (NSE: INFY) (BSE: INFY) (NYSE: INFY) announced a significant acquisition aimed at revolutionizing healthcare providers' access to AI-powered cloud and digital transformation services. Infosys, a prominent player in next-generation digital services and consulting, affirms its commitment to enhancing industry capabilities through this strategic move.

data.title: Zion Forever Project Announces National Search for New Board Members
data.description: A nationwide search is underway for two to four new board members by the Zion Forever Project, aiming to safeguard Zion National Park and the wider region. The organization desires individuals who are passionate about preserving the valued landscapes and are well-connected with the mission at heart. Founded in 1929, Zion Forever Project is seeking dedicated individuals to assist in overseeing the protection of one of the nation’s beloved national parks as it embarks on a crucial new phase.

data.title: McLaren Racing, current F1 champ, will join Google, FedEx, IBM, and others on Hedera Council to oversee growth.
data.description: McLaren, the current reigning Formula 1 champion, will be collaborating with companies like Google, FedEx, and IBM to support the growth of Hedera. Hedera is fortunate to have the expertise of these established firms, which will undoubtedly contribute to the success of the project.
